COURT APPROVED THE VISITATION SCHEDULE. ON THE REMAINING ISSUE OF L/C DESIGNATION, THE COURT RULED THAT IT CANNOT MAKE A FINDING UNDER FAMILY CODE SECTION 3044 BASED ON THE INFORMATION PRESENTED. PARTIES AWARDED JOINT L/C, BUT ANY COMMUNICATION BETWEEN THE PARTIES PERTAINING TO THE CHILDREN SHALL BE IN WRITING ONLY. PARTIES MUST BE CIVIL & NON THREATENING IN THEIR CORRESPONDENCE. COURT ORDERED PARTIES TO KEEP COPIES OF THEIR CORRESPONDENCE REGARDING THE MINOR CHILDREN. PARTIES SHALL EQUALLY SHARE THE COSTS FOR THE EXCHANGES @ RALLY.
